arguments.text: Morning digest: Collecting overnight escalations from all agents via acp. Querying Maxwell for Gmail overnight summary. Synthesizing a concise morning digest with urgent items, today's commitments, and one top priority.

content.text:
The cron job for the morning digest is already running. No new action is needed at this moment.

I will proceed with collecting overnight escalations from all agents via acp and querying Maxwell for any Gmail overnight summaries. I'll then synthesize a concise morning digest, including urgent items, today's commitments, and one top priority, to be sent to Louis via Telegram.

Starting the process now.
